docs.title: Velo
docs.text:
ecluhost installing velo

rbit's sr github link Contains the Velo lua guide and the SR level api.

Velo-Docs link Documentation of fields and targets availiable to lua scripting with Velo made searchable by mkdocs. Repo maintained by sky!! not rbit.

rbit's tas guide in the sr discord link

docs.title: asset making
docs.text:
xnb-js link A webapp and library for packing and unpacking xnb images in the browser.

VariantX link a webapp for exporting organized sprite sheets for skin edting among other functions along with a lua script for Aesprite.

TinyMaD website link It has a large collection of trails as well as other modded assets. It also has stats tracking.

Velo-Docs link
